title: Episode 08
wikitext:
[]: Episode 08             Quote Post by Cypher » Wed Aug 19, 2009 4:47 am I was just wondering why they decided to transport Unit 02/Adam using the navy when they could have used one of those eva specific transport planes. I originally thought it had something to do with the range of these aircraft but Unit 03 was transported from America using one. So I am wondering if Seele intentionally transported Adam over the ocean to draw out Gaghiel and sent Unit 02 with it for the specific reason of defeating that angel. However because they didn't want to make this seem obvious they decided not to equip Unit 02 with underwater equipment. Discuss

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 19, 2009 6:40 am They wanted to make the navy feel needed. Also, Anno likes ships.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Aug 19, 2009 9:16 am Gendo had Adam and Unit-02 transported together so the Eva could protect the embryo in case of an Angel attack. This would have been very difficult on an airplane. Seele didn't know that Gendo was smuggling Adam into Japan; see Kaji's fears in Episode 23' that Seele would discover that he was the one who brought Adam to Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Aug 19, 2009 9:24 am Transporting Eva-02 along with the embryo would have been easy enough on an airplane, but there'd have been no power source for the Eva to run off. An Aircraft Carrier with two nuclear reactors and plenty of power to spare would be perfect for operating an Eva off. That the Angel that confronted them was, very inconveniently, an aquatic Angel, is a matter of plot entirely.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Aug 19, 2009 9:45 am Of course the whole "Adam was on a boat so that Unit-02 could protect her" argument falls down when you remember Unit-02 was apparently next to useless in water.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Aug 19, 2009 9:56 am Useless in water, but don't forget the huge Aircraft Carrier flight deck, or the extended artificial floating reef provided by that huge, densely packed fleet. Each ship provided a potential fighting platform for the Eva. Which, probably, is the only sensible reason for why the fleet was so huge even if it was otherwise useless against an Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Aug 19, 2009 10:34 am Even so, a supersonic jet would've gotten Adam there in the space of a few hours. As a calculated risk this would be far less dangerous than putting Adam on a boat for a few days with an Eva and hope if the angel attacks it doesn't sink the Eva's power source, which by the way wasn't even ready until Misato and co arrived. Don't get me wrong, as a scene in a TV show an Eva skipping on boats like stones above the water is pretty cool, but as an actual plan it's rather daft. (It's probably up there with the "Dance like you want to win!" ballet routine attack plan)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 19, 2009 10:38 am Gendo hates ships. So he put them in a position to get fucked up.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Aug 19, 2009 11:02 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Gendo hates ships. So he put them in a position to get fucked up.

[]: Re: Episode 08             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 19, 2009 11:13 am Cypher wrote: I was just wondering why they decided to transport Unit 02/Adam using the navy when they could have used one of those eva specific transport planes ... Unit 03 was transported from America using one.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Aug 19, 2009 2:06 pm Even so, a supersonic jet would've gotten Adam there in the space of a few hours.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Wed Aug 19, 2009 11:27 pm Given all the back and forth in that episode between Misato and the fleet captain, discussing things like transfer paperwork, international waters jurisdiction, etc., I guess I just assumed that it had something to do with bureaucratic red tape. I figured that any decisions involving the mode of transport were probably handled by NERV's branch in Germany. Once delivery to Japan was complete and transfer of ownership made official, Commander Ikari and/or those under his command would then have the final say in all matters related to Unit-02 and its pilot. Plus, I think all the scenes with battleships were intended as a subreference to Anno's previous series, Nadia Secret of the Blue Water.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:50 am Because it's cool for SOMEONE to have a scene with tons of naval power, even if it's totally useless. i could totally emphasize with Kensuke during that battle scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Aug 20, 2009 2:12 am If it's an aquatic angel, it would never have been able to reach Lilith, so they put one to fight on the see.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 20, 2009 4:00 am Allemann wrote: If it's an aquatic angel, it would never have been able to reach Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Aug 20, 2009 4:14 am Reichu wrote: Allemann wrote: If it's an aquatic angel, it would never have been able to reach Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Aug 20, 2009 5:31 am Shamshel thought it would work.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:59 pm Allemann wrote: Reichu wrote: Allemann wrote: If it's an aquatic angel, it would never have been able to reach Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 22, 2009 1:39 pm But there's the problem. It's an Eva, you ca equip it for situations. So you have a land based battle ready Eva vs a Fat Floating Aqua Marshmellow. Slightly biased fight? Slightly.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 22, 2009 9:13 pm Fat Floating Aqua Marshmallow? More like a deformed cross between a ray and a mosasaur if you ask me. That's not something you want to fuck with.
summary: []: Episode 08             Quote Post by Cypher » Wed Aug 19, 2009 4:47 am I was just wondering why they decided to transport Unit 02/Adam using the navy when they could have used one of those eva specific transport planes. I originally thought it had something to do with the range of these aircraft but Unit 03 was transported from America using one. So I am wondering if Seele intentionally transported Adam over the ocean to draw out Gaghie
